Fantastic service and incredibly fast! Blinkit has completely changed how I shop for daily essentials. The delivery truly takes less than 10–15 minutes, and the items always arrive well-packaged. The app is super easy to use, and I love that they carry everything from groceries to electronics now. Highly recommended!

The price difference has also not been refunded. I would advise customers to carefully check their orders after delivery, as mistakes like this can result in payin

10th. July. Getting dissatisfied. It shows 8 mins to deliver while ordering, once the order is placed it skips to 18mins. So actually it will be delivered in 20-25 mins in real time. Is it time to look out for new options? Been using the app for years now. But currently facing problem as the delivery person is being shown some other route to my residence on map. Please look into the matter as it's an inconvenience to both the delivery person & customer.

Blinkit has made grocery shopping incredibly convenient. The app is easy to use, offers a wide range of products, and delivers orders very quickly. Most of my orders arrive within minutes, and the items are usually fresh and well-packed. The delivery partners are polite, and the real-time tracking feature is helpful. While some products can occasionally be out of stock, the overall experience is excellent. Highly recommended for anyone looking for fast and reliable grocery delivery.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Excellent quality blanket! It was delivered on time, exactly as promised. The material is soft, warm, and feels very premium. The stitching and overall finish are excellent, and it provides great comfort. I'm really happy with my purchase and the entire shopping experience. Fast delivery, great quality, and good value for money. Highly recommended!

I've had a great experience using Blinkit. The app is fast, user-friendly, and the delivery is consistently quick. The quality of the products I've received has always been excellent, with fresh groceries and well-packed items. The wide variety of products and reliable service make shopping very convenient. Thank you for maintaining such high standards—keep up the great work!

Blinkit is very Unprofessional. please really had a bad experience with them. I ordered Mini Mogra Rice and then sent Mogra Delight. Even though we called the customer support team and they were really unprofessional not ready to help first. later my husband spoke so they initiated a replacement but still the wrong item was delivered. which made us very upset that they are not helping us. Later after talking with Ayushi she initiated a refund but only after the product is returned to them. Sorry

Extremely disappointing service. I received a product that was not in proper condition, but instead of resolving the issue, customer support kept repeating the same responses and dragged the complaint on for hours. I was asked for explanations and details again and again for a very simple issue. As a customer, I paid full price for the product and expected to receive it in proper condition. Instead, I was left wasting my time trying to convince support that there was a genuine problem

We have trusted Blinkit with our orders but this experience has disappointed me alot more than I expected. I hope you look over this matter blinkit.

Very useful for ordering vegetables and groceries. Every item comes fresh and well packed. Drinks come in chilled condition. Their maximum average delivery time is hardly 10-15 mins. That's very impressive. Electronics and some other useful products are also available here at their best prices. Fruits are also available but their prices are 3-times than the offline market price that's make no sense to me. So, I avoid ordering vegetables.

App is ok occasional issue while applying voucher codes, but the problem is I always see surge price of 30rs after 5pm evening. although they say delivery is free they collect it through surge fee most of the time. to avoid that you have to order atleast 500. secondly, on comparing with other widely used platforms most of the product rates are usually higher by 10-15% from other platforms. So not a great experience overall.

A worst experience where I had ordered some products from this app and those were available on other platforms comparatively at lower price, hence i had cancelled my order and my money deducted were given me as coupon instead of refunding to original payment method and moreover I had received a text message stating that coupon will expire in a month if nothing ordered. If I would not order anything or forget to order them my money without a cause will be gone. so I am uninstalling this app now.

I cancelled an order worth approximately ₹266, but the refund was not credited back to my original payment method. Instead, Blinkit issued the amount as a coupon without providing any option to choose between a refund to the source account and store credit. This approach is disappointing, as customers should have the right to decide how they receive their refund. Moreover, the coupon issued is not easy to utilize, making the situation even more inconvenient.

"Great service! My order was delivered very quickly, and all the items were fresh and well-packed. The app is easy to use, and the delivery partners are polite and professional. Very convenient for last-minute grocery needs. Highly recommended!"

Blinkit has completely changed my shopping experience! Super fast delivery, fresh products, great discounts, and excellent packaging every time. The app is smooth and easy to use. Customer service is also quick and helpful. Truly one of the most reliable and convenient delivery apps ever!

On June 24, 2026. I placed the order in the blinkit app worth 650 INR. The first delivery driver delivered the 2 products out of the 3 items. I think the delivery drivers need to be provided a message to deliver timely or else do not provide the false reach time of 9 min.

I would like to rate minus 0, minus 100 etc, as I was waiting for long time whatever I order, and they cancelled the order from their side. if this app made for ease whatever their advertise say, then should not cancel like such

I used to order a lot from this app but suddenly I started receiving rotten and spoiled items and hence stopped using this app and switched back to my local kirana shop and vegetable vendor.....the experience was pathetic and it couldn't be more worst also the query section doesn't work they ask us to email our query which is again very hectic.

this app is not good at all... handling fees are high and not exact everytime you order something(5-50rs) aside from that extra charges (around 40rs for no reason)if you order something even above 100rs you'll realise you are paying 50-70rs extra for no reason....this app needs to stop charging extra....this app rarely allows cash on delivery too and glitches dont allow you to place order sometimes....

Very disappointing experience. The oranges I received were rotten and completely unfit to eat. Blinkit needs to improve its quality checks and customer support. I hope this issue is taken seriously to prevent other customers from facing the same experience.

Built an app to compare 7 quick commerce stores + cab fares (Uber, Ola, Rapido) in one place. A while ago, I built Comparify to compare real-time prices and delivery times between Blinkit, Zepto, and Instamart, mainly because I was tired of overpaying for everyday stuff. Then I added a cab fare comparison feature (Uber, Ola, Rapido & Namma Yatri) so people could check which app’s cheaper with their actual prices, including coupons, offers, and wallet balances. Now there’s a new update: Comparify now supports JioMart, Flipkart Minutes, BigBasket, and DMart, so you can compare even more stores at once. It’s been fun seeing how wildly prices and delivery times differ between these apps sometimes 😅 If you haven’t tried it yet, you can check it out here: [Play Store](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.akshat.comparify) [App Store](https://apps.apple.com/in/app/comparify-cabs-g

Zepto, BB & Blinkit Users: Here’s the Secret to Never Paying Delivery Fees Again. Delivery fees may look small, but they add up faster than your snack cravings! Here’s how to **get free delivery (and sometimes extra discounts)** on Zepto, BigBasket, and Blinkit: 💰 **1. Cart Value Sweet Spot** – Instead of buying one big order, split into smaller orders just above the *free delivery* threshold (₹149–₹199) to save on fees without overstocking. 📅 **2. Off-Peak Orders** – Ordering early morning or late night often removes surge/peak delivery charges. 🎯 **3. Bank & UPI Partner Offers** – Keep an eye on payment partners like Paytm, Amazon Pay, or specific bank cards that waive delivery charges during promo periods. 📦 **4. Combine with Cashback Apps** – Use apps like Magicpin or CRED Pay to stack delivery fee waivers with cashback/rewards. 🎁 **5. Free Trial Loopholes** – Many grocery apps
